creator: bofh@freebsd.org
text: I am not sure exactly what happened with these two versions 1.4.9 and 1.4.10. Because the files from `make makesum` and `make fetch` were not the same. I did not do enough testing with `make distclean` either because never faced such cases. However I have updated this to 1.15.6 and have thoroughly tested on all versions with `make distclean` beforehand. Let me know how the new version goes.
